aboutParagraphs: Computer Science student at Canara Engineering College, Mangalore, graduating in 2026. I build across backend systems, full-stack mobile applications, and graph-based machine learning. Currently working as a Software Engineering Intern at Orbit (since Feb 24, 2026).

Currently deepening my skills in cloud infrastructure and DevOps (AWS, Docker, CI/CD pipelines). Looking for a software engineering role where I can work on production systems that combine backend architecture with applied ML.

skillGroups.title: Languages
skillGroups.note: Java for problem-solving, Python for ML/backend, JavaScript/TypeScript for full-stack.

skillGroups.title: Frameworks
skillGroups.note: Full-stack and backend frameworks for building robust API endpoints and mobile experiences.

skillGroups.title: Databases
skillGroups.note: Relational and document storage solutions modeled for scalable workflows.

skillGroups.title: DevOps
skillGroups.note: Containerization, automated version control, and Unix operations.

skillGroups.title: AI / ML
skillGroups.note: Deep learning frameworks, custom graph models, and computer vision pipelines.

skillGroups.title: Tools
skillGroups.note: API testing, crash monitoring, and workflow automations.

projects.name: GraphSentinel
projects.description: GraphSentinel detects network attacks (DDoS, PortScan, Botnet, SSH-Patator, DoS Hulk) by modeling traffic as a graph rather than isolated flow records. It classifies malicious nodes in real time using a GraphSAGE model trained on CICIDS2017.

projects.name: Orbit
projects.description: Orbit is a mobile social platform for discovering local community events and connecting with nearby users. Built with real-time chat via WebSockets, geolocation-based event discovery, and a containerized backend with Sentry error monitoring.

projects.name: PII Shield
projects.description: PII Shield detects and redacts sensitive information (Aadhaar, PAN numbers) from documents entirely on the user's device, with no data ever leaving their machine. Features a local OCR pipeline and a stateless, zero-retention backend.

projects.name: HVSapp
projects.description: HVSapp streamlines patient handoffs and medication tracking between healthcare staff, using speech-to-text to reduce manual data-entry errors. Features background transcription task queues and PHI field encryption.

projects.name: Shopping Cart App
projects.description: A complete e-commerce mobile app with product browsing, cart management, and checkout, built and deployed independently. Configured with rate limiting, database connection pooling, and error monitoring.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025 - Team Cipher Squad
achievements.organization: LAVIS - Loan Asset Verification & Information System
achievements.description: Selected for Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025 national round with LAVIS, a machine learning-based collateral verification solution.

achievements.title: Core Unleashed Hackathon - Team Lead
achievements.description: Led a team to build PII Shield within a 36-hour constraint, driving core architecture decisions and managing code quality across the team.

achievements.title: Healthcare Hackathon - Team Lead
achievements.description: Led backend development for HVSapp, a clinical handoff platform, within a 48-hour deadline.

achievements.title: Open Source Contributor - Social Networking Platform
achievements.description: Merged 5+ pull requests as an open-source contributor, improving event discovery and session handling on a social networking platform.
